identifies_rocblas_issue.evidence: Correctly identifies: 'The default rocBLAS kernels for the gfx1150/gfx1151 architecture (RDNA 3.5) are poorly optimized for prompt processing workloads' and explains Tensile vs TensileLt difference

hipblaslt_solution.evidence: export ROCBLAS_USE_HIPBLASLT=1 prominently featured as the fix, with permanent .bashrc suggestion

expected_improvement.evidence: Exact numbers: Without fix: ~348 t/s, With fix: ~882 t/s (~2.5x improvement), TG unaffected at ~48 t/s
